mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_PIICUSTSTATYEAR SELECT 'YEAR', DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 11 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_11, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 10 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_10, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 9 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_9, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 8 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_8, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 7 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_7, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 6 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_6, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 5 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_5, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 4 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_4, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 3 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_3, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 2 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_2, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 1 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_1, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 0 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_0, SUM(CASE WHEN basedate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 11 MONTH),'%Y%m') THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) cnt_11, SUM(CASE WHEN basedate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 10 MONTH),'%Y%m') THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) cnt_10, SUM(CASE WHEN basedate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 9 MONTH),'%Y%m') THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) cnt_9, SUM(CASE WHEN basedate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 8 MONTH),'%Y%m') THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) cnt_8, SUM(CASE WHEN basedate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 7 MONTH),'%Y%m') THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) cnt_7, SUM(CASE WHEN basedate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 6 MONTH),'%Y%m') THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) cnt_6, SUM(CASE WHEN basedate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 5 MONTH),'%Y%m') THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) cnt_5, SUM(CASE WHEN basedate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 4 MONTH),'%Y%m') THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) cnt_4, SUM(CASE WHEN basedate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 3 MONTH),'%Y%m') THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) cnt_3, SUM(CASE WHEN basedate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 2 MONTH),'%Y%m') THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) cnt_2, SUM(CASE WHEN basedate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 1 MONTH),'%Y%m') THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) cnt_1, SUM(CASE WHEN basedate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 0 MONTH),'%Y%m') THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) cnt_0 FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(basedate, '%Y%m') AS basedate, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM cotdl.tbl_piiextract WHERE basedate >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 12 MONTH) AND RESTORE_DATE IS NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(basedate, '%Y%m')
UNION ALL -- 퍼지 통계 보정 SELECT STAT_DATE AS basedate, SUM(CNT) AS cnt FROM cotdl.TBL_PIIEXTRACT_PURGE_STAT WHERE STAT_TYPE = 'BASEDATE' AND STAT_DATE >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 12 MONTH), '%Y%m') GROUP BY STAT_DATE ) AS f
mapper.select: SELECT chartname, SUBSTR(ym_11, 3) AS ym_11, SUBSTR(ym_10, 3) AS ym_10, SUBSTR(ym_9, 3) AS ym_9, SUBSTR(ym_8, 3) AS ym_8, SUBSTR(ym_7, 3) AS ym_7, SUBSTR(ym_6, 3) AS ym_6, SUBSTR(ym_5, 3) AS ym_5, SUBSTR(ym_4, 3) AS ym_4, SUBSTR(ym_3, 3) AS ym_3, SUBSTR(ym_2, 3) AS ym_2, SUBSTR(ym_1, 3) AS ym_1, SUBSTR(ym_0, 3) AS ym_0, cnt_11, cnt_10, cnt_9, cnt_8, cnt_7, cnt_6, cnt_5, cnt_4, cnt_3, cnt_2, cnt_1, cnt_0 FROM COTDL.TBL_PIICUSTSTATYEAR where chartname = 'YEARSUM' limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into COTDL.TBL_PIICUSTSTATYEAR select 'YEARSUM', DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 11 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_11 ,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 10 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_10 ,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 9 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_9 ,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 8 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_8 ,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 7 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_7 ,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 6 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_6 ,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 5 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_5 ,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 4 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_4 ,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 3 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_3 ,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 2 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_2 ,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 1 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_1 ,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 0 MONTH),'%Y/%m') ym_0 ,sum(case when basedate <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 11 MONTH),'%Y%m') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_11 ,sum(case when basedate <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 10 MONTH),'%Y%m') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_10 ,sum(case when basedate <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 9 MONTH),'%Y%m') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_9 ,sum(case when basedate <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 8 MONTH),'%Y%m') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_8 ,sum(case when basedate <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 7 MONTH),'%Y%m') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_7 ,sum(case when basedate <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 6 MONTH),'%Y%m') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_6 ,sum(case when basedate <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 5 MONTH),'%Y%m') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_5 ,sum(case when basedate <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 4 MONTH),'%Y%m') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_4 ,sum(case when basedate <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 3 MONTH),'%Y%m') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_3 ,sum(case when basedate <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 2 MONTH),'%Y%m') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_2 ,sum(case when basedate <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 1 MONTH),'%Y%m') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_1 ,sum(case when basedate <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 0 MONTH),'%Y%m') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_0 from ( select DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y%m') basedate, count(1) cnt from cotdl.tbl_piiextract a where basedate >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 12 MONTH) and RESTORE_DATE is null group by DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y%m')
UNION ALL -- 퍼지 통계 보정 SELECT STAT_DATE AS basedate, SUM(CNT) AS cnt FROM cotdl.TBL_PIIEXTRACT_PURGE_STAT WHERE STAT_TYPE = 'BASEDATE' AND STAT_DATE >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 12 MONTH), '%Y%m') GROUP BY STAT_DATE ) as f

choose.otherwise: and (exclude_reason is null or exclude_reason not in ('DELARC','RESTORE'))

trim.if: and b.exeend < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{search5, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%Y/%m'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)

mapper.insert:
insert into COTDL.TBL_PIICUSTSTAT SELECT 'ALLDAYS', exedate, SUM(archive_cnt1) AS archive_cnt1, SUM(restore_cnt1) AS restore_cnt1, SUM(arc_del_cnt1) AS arc_del_cnt1, SUM(archive_cnt2) AS archive_cnt2, SUM(restore_cnt2) AS restore_cnt2, SUM(arc_del_cnt2) AS arc_del_cnt2, SUM(archive_cnt3) AS archive_cnt3, SUM(restore_cnt3) AS restore_cnt3, SUM(arc_del_cnt3) AS arc_del_cnt3 FROM ( -- ✅ arc_del 전체 (tbl_piiextract) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date, '%Y/%m/%d') AS exedate, 0 AS archive_cnt1, 0 AS restore_cnt1, COUNT(*) AS arc_del_cnt1, 0 AS archive_cnt2, 0 AS restore_cnt2, 0 AS arc_del_cnt2, 0 AS archive_cnt3, 0 AS restore_cnt3, 0 AS arc_del_cnt3 FROM cotdl.tbl_piiextract WHERE arc_del_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date, '%Y/%m/%d')
UNION ALL -- 퍼지 보정: ARC_DEL SELECT STAT_DATE AS exedate, 0, 0, CNT, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 FROM cotdl.TBL_PIIEXTRACT_PURGE_STAT WHERE STAT_TYPE = 'ARC_DEL'
UNION ALL -- ✅ archive by policy (tbl_piiextract) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(archive_date, '%Y/%m/%d') AS exedate, 0, 0, 0, SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(jobid,1,11) = 'PII_POLICY2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0, 0, SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(jobid,1,11) = 'PII_POLICY3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0, 0 FROM cotdl.tbl_piiextract WHERE archive_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(archive_date, '%Y/%m/%d')
UNION ALL -- 퍼지 보정: ARCHIVE (POLICY2 → archive_cnt2, POLICY3 → archive_cnt3) SELECT STAT_DATE AS exedate, 0, 0, 0, SUM(CASE WHEN JOBID_PREFIX = 'PII_POLICY2' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END), 0, 0, SUM(CASE WHEN JOBID_PREFIX = 'PII_POLICY3' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END), 0, 0 FROM cotdl.TBL_PIIEXTRACT_PURGE_STAT WHERE STAT_TYPE = 'ARCHIVE' GROUP BY STAT_DATE
UNION ALL -- ✅ restore 전체 (tbl_piiextract) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(restore_date, '%Y/%m/%d') AS exedate, 0, COUNT(*) AS restore_cnt1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 FROM cotdl.tbl_piiextract WHERE restore_date IS NOT NULL AND EXCLUDE_REASON = 'RESTORE' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(restore_date, '%Y/%m/%d')
UNION ALL -- 퍼지 보정: RESTORE_ALL SELECT STAT_DATE AS exedate, 0, CNT, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 FROM cotdl.TBL_PIIEXTRACT_PURGE_STAT WHERE STAT_TYPE = 'RESTORE_ALL'
UNION ALL -- ✅ restore by policy (tbl_piiextract) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(restore_date, '%Y/%m/%d') AS exedate, 0, 0, 0, 0, SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(jobid,1,11) = 'PII_POLICY2' AND EXCLUDE_REASON = 'RESTORE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0, 0, SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(jobid,1,11) = 'PII_POLICY3' AND EXCLUDE_REASON = 'RESTORE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0 FROM cotdl.tbl_piiextract WHERE restore_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(restore_date, '%Y/%m/%d')
UNION ALL -- 퍼지 보정: RESTORE (POLICY2 → restore_cnt2, POLICY3 → restore_cnt3) SELECT STAT_DATE AS exedate, 0, 0, 0, 0, SUM(CASE WHEN JOBID_PREFIX = 'PII_POLICY2' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END), 0, 0, SUM(CASE WHEN JOBID_PREFIX = 'PII_POLICY3' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END), 0 FROM cotdl.TBL_PIIEXTRACT_PURGE_STAT WHERE STAT_TYPE = 'RESTORE' GROUP BY STAT_DATE
UNION ALL -- ✅ arc_del DELARC 전체 (tbl_piiextract) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date, '%Y/%m/%d') AS exedate, 0, 0, COUNT(*), 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 FROM cotdl.tbl_piiextract WHERE arc_del_date IS NOT NULL AND EXCLUDE_REASON = 'DELARC' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date, '%Y/%m/%d')
UNION ALL -- 퍼지 보정: ARC_DEL_DELARC SELECT STAT_DATE AS exedate, 0, 0, CNT, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 FROM cotdl.TBL_PIIEXTRACT_PURGE_STAT WHERE STAT_TYPE = 'ARC_DEL_DELARC'
UNION ALL -- ✅ arc_del DELARC by policy (tbl_piiextract) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date, '%Y/%m/%d') AS exedate, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(jobid,1,11) = 'PII_POLICY2' AND EXCLUDE_REASON = 'DELARC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0, 0, SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(jobid,1,11) = 'PII_POLICY3' AND EXCLUDE_REASON = 'DELARC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM cotdl.tbl_piiextract WHERE arc_del_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date, '%Y/%m/%d')
UNION ALL -- 퍼지 보정: ARC_DEL_DELARC_P (POLICY2 → arc_del_cnt2, POLICY3 → arc_del_cnt3) SELECT STAT_DATE AS exedate, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, SUM(CASE WHEN JOBID_PREFIX = 'PII_POLICY2' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END), 0, 0, SUM(CASE WHEN JOBID_PREFIX = 'PII_POLICY3' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END) FROM cotdl.TBL_PIIEXTRACT_PURGE_STAT WHERE STAT_TYPE = 'ARC_DEL_DELARC_P' GROUP BY STAT_DATE ) a GROUP BY exedate ORDER BY exedate

insert into COTDL.TBL_PIICUSTSTAT select 'ALLMONTHS', STR_TO_DATE(concat( DATE_FORMAT(mon,'%Y/%m'), '/01'), '%Y/%m/%d') as mon , sum(archive_cnt1) as archive_cnt1, sum(restore_cnt1) as restore_cnt1, sum(arc_del_cnt1) as arc_del_cnt1 , sum(archive_cnt2) as archive_cnt2, sum(restore_cnt2) as restore_cnt2, sum(arc_del_cnt2) as arc_del_cnt2 , sum(archive_cnt3) as archive_cnt3, sum(restore_cnt3) as restore_cnt3, sum(arc_del_cnt3) as arc_del_cnt3 from COTDL.TBL_PIICUSTSTAT where chartname='ALLDAYS' group by STR_TO_DATE(concat( DATE_FORMAT(mon,'%Y/%m'), '/01'), '%Y/%m/%d') order by STR_TO_DATE(concat( DATE_FORMAT(mon,'%Y/%m'), '/01'), '%Y/%m/%d')

INSERT INTO TBL_PIICUSTSTAT (MON, CHARTNAME, ARCHIVE_CNT1, RESTORE_CNT1, ARC_DEL_CNT1, ARCHIVE_CNT2, RESTORE_CNT2, ARC_DEL_CNT2, ARCHIVE_CNT3, RESTORE_CNT3, ARC_DEL_CNT3) SELECT date AS MON, 'ALLDAYS' AS CHARTNAME, -- CHARTNAME의 기본값 또는 원하는 값을 지정하세요 0 AS ARCHIVE_CNT1, 0 AS RESTORE_CNT1, 0 AS ARC_DEL_CNT1, 0 AS ARCHIVE_CNT2, 0 AS RESTORE_CNT2, 0 AS ARC_DEL_CNT2, 0 AS ARCHIVE_CNT3, 0 AS RESTORE_CNT3, 0 AS ARC_DEL_CNT3 FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD('2023-01-01', INTERVAL seq - 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') AS date FROM ( SELECT @num := @num + 1 AS seq FROM information_schema.tables a CROSS JOIN information_schema.tables b CROSS JOIN (SELECT @num := 0) c ) T WHERE seq <= DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), '2023-01-01') + 1 )date_range LEFT JOIN TBL_PIICUSTSTAT ON date_range.date = TBL_PIICUSTSTAT.MON and TBL_PIICUSTSTAT.chartname = 'ALLDAYS' WHERE TBL_PIICUSTSTAT.MON IS NULL
mapper.select:
select DATE_FORMAT(mon,'%Y/%m/%d') as mon, archive_cnt1, restore_cnt1, arc_del_cnt1, archive_cnt2, restore_cnt2, arc_del_cnt2, archive_cnt3, restore_cnt3, arc_del_cnt3 from COTDL.TBL_PIICUSTSTAT where 1=1
and chartname='ALLDAYS'
and chartname='ALLMONTHS'
order by mon
limit #{offset}, #{amount}

select count(1) from COTDL.TBL_PIICUSTSTAT where 1=1
and chartname='ALLDAYS'
and chartname='ALLMONTHS'

select mon, sum(arccnt) arccnt, sum(delarccnt) delarccnt from ( select DATE_FORMAT(b.exeend,'%Y/%m/%d') as mon, b.table_name, 0 arccnt , sum(b.execnt) delarccnt from cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable b where b.jobid='ARC_DATA_DELETE' and b.steptype='EXE_ARC_DELETE' and b.db='DAON' and b.owner='COOWNSER' and b.table_name='DOSREG' and b.exeend is not null and b.status = 'Ended OK'
group by mon, table_name
union all
select DATE_FORMAT(b.exeend,'%Y/%m/%d') as mon, b.table_name, sum(b.execnt) arccnt, 0 as delarccnt from cotdl.tbl_piiorder a, cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable b where a.orderid = b.orderid and b.steptype in ('EXE_DELETE', 'EXE_UPDATE') and b.db='DAON' and b.owner='COOWNSER' and b.table_name='DOSREG' and b.exeend is not null and a.status = 'Ended OK' and b.status = 'Ended OK'
group by mon, table_name ) total group by mon, table_name order by mon desc limit #{offset}, #{amount}

select count(1) from ( select mon, sum(arccnt) arccnt, sum(delarccnt) delarccnt from ( select DATE_FORMAT(b.exeend,'%Y/%m/%d') as mon, b.table_name, 0 arccnt , sum(b.execnt) delarccnt from cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable b where b.jobid='ARC_DATA_DELETE' and b.steptype='EXE_ARC_DELETE' and b.db='DAON' and b.owner='COOWNSER' and b.table_name='DOSREG' and b.exeend is not null and b.status = 'Ended OK'
group by mon, table_name
union all
select DATE_FORMAT(b.exeend,'%Y/%m/%d') as mon, b.table_name, sum(b.execnt) arccnt, 0 as delarccnt from cotdl.tbl_piiorder a, cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable b where a.orderid = b.orderid and b.steptype in ('EXE_DELETE', 'EXE_UPDATE') and b.db='DAON' and b.owner='COOWNSER' and b.table_name='DOSREG' and b.exeend is not null and a.status = 'Ended OK' and b.status = 'Ended OK'
group by mon, table_name ) total group by mon, table_name ) cnt

select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiextract where custid = #{ssn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and SUBSTRING( jobid, 1, 11 ) = 'PII_POLICY3' and ARCHIVE_DATE is not null and RESTORE_DATE is null and ARC_DEL_DATE is null

select orderid, jobid, actid, custid, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, exclude_reason, DATE_FORMAT(actrole_end_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as actrole_end_date, DATE_FORMAT(archive_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as archive_date, DATE_FORMAT(delete_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as delete_date, DATE_FORMAT(restore_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as restore_date, DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as arc_del_date , DATE_FORMAT(last_base_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as last_base_date, DATE_FORMAT(expected_arc_del_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as expected_arc_del_date , cust_nm, birth_dt, address, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_pin, inst_cd, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5, val6, val7 from cotdl.tbl_piiextract where custid = #{ssn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and SUBSTRING( jobid, 1, 11 ) = 'PII_POLICY3' and ARCHIVE_DATE is not null and RESTORE_DATE is null and ARC_DEL_DATE is null limit 1

select DATE_FORMAT(mon,'%m/%d') mon , archive_cnt1, restore_cnt1, arc_del_cnt1, archive_cnt2, restore_cnt2, arc_del_cnt2, archive_cnt3, restore_cnt3, arc_del_cnt3 from ( select * from COTDL.TBL_PIICUSTSTAT where chartname = 'ALLDAYS' order by mon desc limit 60 ) a order by DATE_FORMAT(mon,'%y/%m/%d')

select * from ( select DATE_FORMAT(mon, '%y/%m') as mon , archive_cnt1, restore_cnt1, arc_del_cnt1, archive_cnt2, restore_cnt2, arc_del_cnt2, archive_cnt3, restore_cnt3, arc_del_cnt3 from COTDL.TBL_PIICUSTSTAT where chartname = 'ALLMONTHS' order by mon desc limit 36 ) a order by mon
